content:
# Wet Air Oxidation

**Summary**: A process that uses heat and pressure to oxidize aqueous phases using oxygen from the air.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] used wet air oxidation (WAO) as a pre-treatment for spent caustic waste.

## Scientific Context

- [[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023]] Used as a primary treatment for spent caustic to reduce sulfur and organic content.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods



## Key Findings Across Sources

- WAO can convert sulfur species to sodium sulfate and complex molecules into biodegradable compounds. ([[2023-al-aqeel|Al-Aqeel, 2023, p. 23]])
